news.title:
Adani Energy Solutions' board to review FY26 results on April 23; trading window closes April 1-27.
Shares down 8.4% YTD; JM Financial gives 'Buy' rating with ₹1,199 target citing T&D growth opportunities.
news.summary:
Adani Energy Solutions' board to review FY26 results on April 23; trading window closes April 1-27.
Shares down 8.4% YTD; JM Financial gives 'Buy' rating with ₹1,199 target citing T&D growth opportunities.

news.title:
Adani Energy Solutions to announce Q4 results on April 23.
Results may impact growth, profitability, and quarterly guidance expectations.
news.summary:
Adani Energy Solutions to announce Q4 results on April 23.
Results may impact growth, profitability, and quarterly guidance expectations.

news.title: Adani Energy Solutions schedules board meeting for 23 April 2026.
news.summary: Adani Energy Solutions schedules board meeting for 23 April 2026.

news.title:
Adani Energy Solutions acquired 100 equity shares of South Kalamb Power Transmission from PFC Consulting.
The acquisition aims to enhance power transmission capabilities and shareholder value.
news.summary:
Adani Energy Solutions acquired 100 equity shares of South Kalamb Power Transmission from PFC Consulting.
The acquisition aims to enhance power transmission capabilities and shareholder value.

news.title:
Adani Energy Solutions executed an NSE block trade of 709,615 shares at Rs. 947.1.
Total trade value for Adani Energy's block deal stood at Rs. 67.2 crores.
news.summary:
Adani Energy Solutions executed an NSE block trade of 709,615 shares at Rs. 947.1.
Total trade value for Adani Energy's block deal stood at Rs. 67.2 crores.

news.title:
Adani Energy Solutions issued $500M senior notes due 2041, refinancing 2026 notes.
New notes rated BBB Stable by Fitch and Baa3 Stable by Moody's; old notes redeemed.
news.summary:
Adani Energy Solutions issued $500M senior notes due 2041, refinancing 2026 notes.
New notes rated BBB Stable by Fitch and Baa3 Stable by Moody's; old notes redeemed.

news.title:
Apollo Global invests $500M in Adani Energy Solutions unit for refinancing transmission assets.
Funds will support future infrastructure investments, enabling growth in energy solutions.
news.summary:
Apollo Global invests $500M in Adani Energy Solutions unit for refinancing transmission assets.
Funds will support future infrastructure investments, enabling growth in energy solutions.

news.title:
Adani Energy secures $500M debt facility from Apollo to strengthen finances.
Funds aim to support Adani Energy's growth initiatives and financial stability.
news.summary:
Adani Energy secures $500M debt facility from Apollo to strengthen finances.
Funds aim to support Adani Energy's growth initiatives and financial stability.

news.title: JM Financial assigns 'Buy' rating to Adani Energy with target Rs 1,199.
news.summary: JM Financial assigns 'Buy' rating to Adani Energy with target Rs 1,199.

news.title:
Crisil Ratings upgraded Adani Electricity Mumbai's proposed NCDs to Crisil AAA from AAA Positive.
The rating reflects strong creditworthiness and a stable outlook for the company.
news.summary:
Crisil Ratings upgraded Adani Electricity Mumbai's proposed NCDs to Crisil AAA from AAA Positive.
The rating reflects strong creditworthiness and a stable outlook for the company.

news.title:
Adani Energy Solutions secures $750M loan led by two Japanese banks.
This highlights Japanese lenders' growing interest in India.
news.summary:
Adani Energy Solutions secures $750M loan led by two Japanese banks.
This highlights Japanese lenders' growing interest in India.

news.title:
India's draft National Electricity Policy proposes Rs 200 trillion investment by 2047 in generation, transmission, distribution, and renewables.
Stocks like NTPC, Tata Power, Adani Power, Power Grid, Torrent Power, and JSW Energy may benefit from sector reforms and capacity expansions.
news.summary:
India's draft National Electricity Policy proposes Rs 200 trillion investment by 2047 in generation, transmission, distribution, and renewables.
Stocks like NTPC, Tata Power, Adani Power, Power Grid, Torrent Power, and JSW Energy may benefit from sector reforms and capacity expansions.

news.title: Adani Energy Solutions secures MUFG and SMBC as top financiers for its project.
news.summary: Adani Energy Solutions secures MUFG and SMBC as top financiers for its project.

news.title:
Adani Energy Solutions secures long-term financing from Japanese banks for HVDC project.
The project will transmit renewable energy from Rajasthan's solar regions to India's national grid.
news.summary:
Adani Energy Solutions secures long-term financing from Japanese banks for HVDC project.
The project will transmit renewable energy from Rajasthan's solar regions to India's national grid.

news.title:
Adani Energy Solutions installed 1 crore smart meters, plans 1 crore more by FY27.
AESL leads India's AMISP, installing 2.5 crore meters at 25,000/day, fastest in industry.
news.summary:
Adani Energy Solutions installed 1 crore smart meters, plans 1 crore more by FY27.
AESL leads India's AMISP, installing 2.5 crore meters at 25,000/day, fastest in industry.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley initiates coverage on Adani Energy Solutions with 'overweight' rating, Rs 1,133 target citing strong growth drivers and favourable outlook.
Adani targets 20-25% market share in transmission, 20% in smart metering, with 21% EBITDA CAGR projection for FY25-30; stock up 28% in 12 months.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley initiates coverage on Adani Energy Solutions with 'overweight' rating, Rs 1,133 target citing strong growth drivers and favourable outlook.
Adani targets 20-25% market share in transmission, 20% in smart metering, with 21% EBITDA CAGR projection for FY25-30; stock up 28% in 12 months.

news.title:
India Ratings upgraded Adani Electricity Mumbai's rating to IND AAA with a Stable Outlook.
The upgrade reflects strong creditworthiness and confidence in its financial health.
news.summary:
India Ratings upgraded Adani Electricity Mumbai's rating to IND AAA with a Stable Outlook.
The upgrade reflects strong creditworthiness and confidence in its financial health.

news.title:
Adani Energy Solutions reported 30% adjusted PAT growth in Q3 FY26.
Commissioned 4 transmission projects; installed 19L smart meters, Moody's upgraded 2 subsidiaries.
news.summary:
Adani Energy Solutions reported 30% adjusted PAT growth in Q3 FY26.
Commissioned 4 transmission projects; installed 19L smart meters, Moody's upgraded 2 subsidiaries.

news.title:
Adani Energy Solutions secures hybrid power supply deal with Asahi India Glass.
The agreement supports Asahi India Glass's renewable energy transition.
news.summary:
Adani Energy Solutions secures hybrid power supply deal with Asahi India Glass.
The agreement supports Asahi India Glass's renewable energy transition.

news.title:
Adani Energy Solutions held its Q3 and 9M FY26 earnings call on Jan 23, 2026.
The conference call was hosted by AESL representatives to discuss financial results.
news.summary:
